task: Enhance the Pro Rust web shell with the awesome-design-md xAI-inspired monochrome style, a stronger homepage dialogue box, a star-map knowledge graph, and smooth cinematic UI effects. Reuse existing Pro API/client patterns, update DESIGN.md, docs/PROJECT_STATE.md, docs/pro-rust-architecture.md, and .agent-guardrails evidence, and do not change OSS runtime or add credentials/provider execution.
securityRequirements: Do not add credential fields, provider key entry, auth token handling, provider execution, worker execution, or quota/billing mutation.
Keep all existing Pro execution/admission/intent panels preview-only and rejected where the backend says they are rejected.
dependencyRequirements: Do not add Rust, npm, Python, image, icon, font, or external asset dependencies for this UI redesign.
performanceRequirements: Avoid heavy animation loops, large blur surfaces, remote assets, and client frameworks; keep the server-rendered Maud web shell lightweight.
understandingRequirements: Explain that this is a visual/interaction redesign of the Pro shell only, not a change to hosted execution capability.
continuityRequirements: Reuse the existing Maud render helpers, browser fetchJson pattern, API endpoints, graph selection behavior, and preview-only execution panels.
patternSummary: Pro web is a single server-rendered Rust/Maud page with CSS and a small inline script. Keep API and domain payloads unchanged; improve layout, visual hierarchy, graph-first composition, and panel organization.
smallestViableChange: Enhance the existing Pro web shell with a more dialogue-first xAI-inspired monochrome surface, star-map graph depth, and low-cost cinematic motion while preserving all existing endpoints/actions.
assumptions: The active task is Pro frontend redesign only.

DESIGN.md plus the awesome-design-md xAI reference are the local design source: stark black, spectral white, mono/Universal Sans feel, uppercase telemetry, ghost controls, and cinematic full-field composition; the UI must not imply affiliation with any referenced brand.
The knowledge graph remains the primary surface.
acceptanceCriteria: The Pro web shell still renders every existing graph, run, provider, queue, admission, intent, storage, vault, quota, event, review, and commit panel/action expected by current tests.
The visual enhancement keeps the homepage centered on a causal dialogue box, makes the graph feel more like a cinematic star map, and uses the high-trust monochrome xAI-inspired style from DESIGN.md.
No OSS runtime files, provider credential flows, dependency files, or API/domain behavior are changed.
Docs and evidence describe the redesign and remaining capability boundaries.
expectedBehaviorChanges: The Pro browser shell has a more cinematic dialogue-first and star-map graph-led visual system.
userVisibleEffects: The current Pro homepage appears more premium, cinematic, dialogue-box-led, and star-map graph-led while preserving the existing preview-only controls.
expectedPublicSurfaceChanges: Pro web root page visual structure and styling
nfrRequirements: Maintain readable contrast, keyboard-accessible controls, compact CSS, no remote assets, no secret-shaped strings, and responsive fallback below 1080px.
expectedConcurrencyImpact: None. This is a server-rendered UI/CSS/script refactor with no backend concurrency changes.
rollbackNotes: Revert the Pro web-shell commit; no migration or dependency rollback is required.
riskJustification: The redesign is confined to the Pro Rust web shell plus docs/evidence. Backend API behavior, storage, credentials, queues, and OSS runtime remain unchanged.

sources.taskType: 关键词匹配 (65% 置信度)
